name: UNKNOWN
recommendations: Stay floating: the expected average floating rate is above the ~-3.00% fixed rate (floating wins with ~74% probability). Keep the upside rather than lock in below your forward expectation.
Fixed below current floating: locking now crystallises a rate below what floating pays today. Only lock if you expect floating to fall meaningfully over the horizon.
High floating volatility: the floating rate is uncertain, so the probability estimate is wide. Locking fixed has extra value as insurance against that volatility.
Floating likely wins: ~74% chance the average floating rate exceeds the fixed rate over the horizon.
